case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS SCEARCE, JOHN R.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCEARCE, JOHN R.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SCEARCE, JOHN R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCEARCE, JOHN R. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,026.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO JOHN R. SCEARCE RETURNED TO COURT: MOVED, LEFT NO ADDRESS.
